programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: The river deals Tom's season a fatal blow; Marty fights the ice to make it home; Jason battles a deadline to deliver for his family.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Tom washes out in Idaho and retreats to the Yaak River; Eustace races to stop a breakout; Morgan battles predators large and small.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Tom scrambles to carry out a last-minute bear hunt to save his season; Morgan fights for his future with fire; Eustace has an unexpected showdown.

programme.desc: Tom pays the price for two failed winters in a row; Morgan calls in reinforcements for his horses; Eustace and Preston harvest a hog, and Rich gets the pick of the litter.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Joni Table Talk
programme.desc: Joni and guests tackle a wide range of relevant issues, controversial subjects and hard-hitting news topics with candor and wit.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Lane and Tristan love finding homes and renovating them to their taste. This time, as they search for their forever home by the ocean, Lane wants a turn-key property so they can focus on settling in. Tristan agrees but secretly dreams of customizing another home. With the help of their best friend and realtor Susan, will they be able to find a home that makes them both happy?

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Sean moves to the East Coast to be with Candace, but living in her bachelorette apartment is becoming cramped; they search for a seaside home that accommodates both of their needs.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Misty and Derrick have always felt a deep connection to the ocean; after facing health challenges, they realized life is too short not to live where their hearts belong; now they are on the hunt for a rural home that offers a seaside lifestyle while keeping them close to nature; will they find the perfect balance of peace, ocean, and adventure?

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: With retirement around the corner, Svetlana and Harrison are ready to begin their next chapter by the water; Harrison loves the crisp coastal weather, while Svetlana has always dreamed of ocean views; a small town in Nova Scotia offers the perfect balance, and now they're searching for a home to host family and enjoy their golden years together.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Dalene and Pete have lived a nomadic life for many years and want to find an oceanfront home to put down roots while still sparking their creativity.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Tired of the busy city life, Bert convinces Bruce to leave it all behind for water, grass and relaxation; Bert has high expectations for their new home, while Bruce insists it must be on the water.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Tania and Sundara move to the East Coast for work and are now looking to find a permanent place to live and expand their family; they want a peaceful place near the ocean to relax and enjoy each other.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Sara and Russell are ready to escape the sweltering southern heat and start fresh in a charming fishing village along the East Coast; with Russell's skills as a physician in high demand, they're searching for the perfect home.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Despite being from different parts of the world, Raquel and Samir first bonded over their shared love of the ocean; now married and expecting their first child, they are racing to find the perfect coastal home for their growing family.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Janice and Bob have spent decades dreaming of leaving city life behind for a peaceful home by the sea; with their daughter Sarah, a newly licensed real estate agent, guiding them, they are finally ready to turn their coastal dreams into reality.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: After recovering from cancer, Geralyn's doctor encourages her to embrace life with her husband, Art; for them, this journey leads to the ocean, where they are on a hunt to find a home that truly speaks to them.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Julie and Julian spend most weekends escaping the hustle of city life by sailing, swimming and more; now, tired of noisy neighbors and crowded streets, they decide to turn their weekend ocean escapes into their everyday reality.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: David makes a promise to Camilla's mom that he would bring her home to the East Coast when they retired; now they are back, looking for their forever home, close to family and with a great ocean view.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Liz and Chris enjoy living near the ocean and want to provide their three kids with that same experience; however, they have different opinions on how much to spend to make this dream a reality.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Avid ocean lovers Kimberley and Paul move to the East Coast to retire and live out their oceanfront dream; but their big dreams come with a lot of water toys that they need to accommodate.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Judi and Tom have always been a fan of boating and spending time on the water, but their large oceanside family home is no longer a fit for their needs; they're looking to downsize and move closer to the sailing community they adore.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Shelley and Mike are looking to make their lifelong dream of owning a lakefront property a reality; real estate agent Megan McLeod has three properties ready to tour with the couple.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Terri and Richard want to escape the hustle and bustle of the city; they want a place that will allow them to enjoy their love of water sports and relax and soak in the gorgeous sunset views; it's up to real estate agent Ken Hale.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Brent and Destiny are looking to invest in a waterfront vacation home together; The two are looking for a move-in ready property; Real estate agent Chelsey Penrice is on board with stunning properties to show.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Laura and Dale are looking to leave the chaos of the city behind and find their dream home on the lake; Being avid entertainers, they need a space that will accommodate their many out of town guests and allow for sailor Dale to dock his boat close.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Arlene and Chris are looking for a vacation home on the water to escape to with their family and friends; They are searching for a dream property; A place for their daughter, Ava, to grow up in and make lasting memories.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Years after selling her first lakefront property, Angie is looking for another spot on the water to enjoy with family and friends; With the help of real estate agent, Daryl Idiens, Angie hopes to find another magical spot on the water.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Randy and Cathy are looking to return to the water and purchase a waterfront property of their very own to enjoy with family and friends; Sabrina Staunton has three properties that she's hoping will tick the boxes on their wish-list.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Sharon and Tali are on the hunt for the perfect waterfront property; With a big kitchen at the top of Sharon's wish-list, and a boathouse and separate party space for Tali to hang out with her friends, realtor Shawn Woof must find the ideal space.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Catherine and Neil tour three waterfront properties hoping to find a place to build memories.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Jim and Jill look at lakeside properties with luxe boathouses, tennis courts and private hiking trails.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Lee and Greg are empty nesters looking for a lakefront property that their adult children can come and visit; their search for their dream lake home includes a property with a large separate guest house and an outdoor shower.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Urban professionals Jeremy and Jonathan have been living in an upscale condo in the downtown core; their lack of living space and love for the water has prompted them to search for a lakefront property with lots of room.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Daria and David are searching for a lakefront vacation home where they can unwind and teach dance; their first stop is a modern-rustic retreat with soaring ceilings, breathtaking lake views, a sleek gourmet kitchen, and a massive three-season room built for dancing; they tour a renovated home with an airy lofted great room, a gourmet kitchen with premium prep space, and a lower-level space for dancing; their final visit is a stunning showpiece with cathedral ceilings.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Miriam and Paul are hunting for a lakefront home for their family of six, it has to have incredible windows and views; their first stop is a 4,500-square-foot traditional home with a sunken living room, and a sandy beach with 400 feet of waterfront.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Adriana and Rob are searching for a lakefront getaway that doubles as a vacation home and rental; their first stop is a four-bedroom rustic retreat with soaring timber ceilings, a gourmet kitchen, and a boathouse on a multi-level waterfront.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: On-air radio personality Tim and his wife BB are looking for a lakefront home where they can relax and entertain; their first stop is a four-bedroom retreat with vaulted wood ceilings, a sleek gourmet kitchen, and multiple stone patios, including a gazebo right on the water; a rustic four-bedroom home features dark wood beams, stone fireplaces, a lake-facing kitchen, and a lower-level bar perfect for entertaining on 150 feet of private waterfront.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Catherine and Neil tour three waterfront properties hoping to find a place to build memories.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Jim and Jill look at lakeside properties with luxe boathouses, tennis courts and private hiking trails.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Lee and Greg are empty nesters looking for a lakefront property that their adult children can come and visit; their search for their dream lake home includes a property with a large separate guest house and an outdoor shower.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Urban professionals Jeremy and Jonathan have been living in an upscale condo in the downtown core; their lack of living space and love for the water has prompted them to search for a lakefront property with lots of room.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Daria and David are searching for a lakefront vacation home where they can unwind and teach dance; their first stop is a modern-rustic retreat with soaring ceilings, breathtaking lake views, a sleek gourmet kitchen, and a massive three-season room built for dancing; they tour a renovated home with an airy lofted great room, a gourmet kitchen with premium prep space, and a lower-level space for dancing; their final visit is a stunning showpiece with cathedral ceilings.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Miriam and Paul are hunting for a lakefront home for their family of six, it has to have incredible windows and views; their first stop is a 4,500-square-foot traditional home with a sunken living room, and a sandy beach with 400 feet of waterfront.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Adriana and Rob are searching for a lakefront getaway that doubles as a vacation home and rental; their first stop is a four-bedroom rustic retreat with soaring timber ceilings, a gourmet kitchen, and a boathouse on a multi-level waterfront.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: On-air radio personality Tim and his wife BB are looking for a lakefront home where they can relax and entertain; their first stop is a four-bedroom retreat with vaulted wood ceilings, a sleek gourmet kitchen, and multiple stone patios, including a gazebo right on the water; a rustic four-bedroom home features dark wood beams, stone fireplaces, a lake-facing kitchen, and a lower-level bar perfect for entertaining on 150 feet of private waterfront.

programme.desc: Shelley and Mike are looking to make their lifelong dream of owning a lakefront property a reality; real estate agent Megan McLeod has three properties ready to tour with the couple.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Terri and Richard want to escape the hustle and bustle of the city; they want a place that will allow them to enjoy their love of water sports and relax and soak in the gorgeous sunset views; it's up to real estate agent Ken Hale.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: Never Scrub Your Floors Again
programme.desc: See why this cleaning tool replaces chemicals and hard labor!

programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Eustace Conway survives by hunting, fishing and raising animals; Tom Oar lives with his wife on the Yaak River in Montana; Marty Meierotto, his wife and their daughter live in the small Alaskan town of Two Rivers.

programme.desc: Tom tries to save a friend's water supply and hunt his winter's meat; Eustace deals with the threat of someone trying to take his land; Marty Meierotto combats life-or-death situations due to breakdowns.

programme.desc: Eustace's fight with Justin reaches a boiling point; Tom loses his way high in the Rockies; Marty fights the elements as he tries to get home.

programme.desc: Tom makes a decision that will determine the rest of his life; Marty battles the weather in order to make it home for his family; Eustace continues protecting Turtle Island despite being sick.

programme.desc: Jarrett has a big problem on his hands when an oversize chair won't fit down the stairs; things heat up when Marc transports wine across the country.
